verdict.reason: Not green. The apparent +41.8% v0.18-vs-committed-v0.17 delta is dominated by baseline drift; the same-session signal is +7.7%. Rerun after hibernate on a warmed, clock-stable GPU.
other_default_path_overhead_candidates: Wider default State pytree from RAINNC/QVAPOR plus hail/aerosol substrate may affect donation/dealiasing and HLO pressure even when schemes are default-off.
The public forecast wrapper's _dealias_pytree_buffers traversal over the wider State tree is one-time per call, not per-step, but remains a plausible warm-call contributor.
Larger registry/catalog fail-closed additions are mostly Python validation and lower priority for timestep overhead.
K2 default-off is unlikely because the graph proof selected the default runner and emitted no collectives.
